title: Velocity Blur
description: Velocity Blur adds a speed-based motion blur effect while you move. Client-side only
body:
Velocity Blur is a small client-side mod that adds a velocity blur effect based on your movement speed. The faster you move, the stronger the blur. It also shows a simple speed counter in the top-right corner (blocks per second (optional)).




Features:

 

 

  • Motion blur that scales with player speed
  • Simple speed HUD: xx.xx blocks/s (top-right) (optional)
  • Client-side only

 

CONFIG:
